about.title: About me
about.description: A Paraguayan developer, graduated in Systems Analysis, I enjoy crafting innovative solutions using JavaScript and React. I have knowledge in machine learning with Python and a foundational proficiency in MySQL and MongoDB. I am enthusiastic about Virtual and Augmented Reality, using the Vuforia engine, as well as creating engaging and user-friendly interfaces.

povertyStoplight.title: Frontend Tech Lead
points: Leading frontend delivery of scalable, user-focused applications.
Building for web and mobile with React and React Native while keeping product consistency.
Driving a new Flutter app while migrating the current React Native app progressively.

posibilian.title: Fullstack Developer
points: Developed web tools and debugged backend functionalities using Nest.js and PostgreSQL to improve performance and accuracy.
Built and maintained scalable APIs, applying data processing techniques to enhance application efficiency.
Designed and developed user-friendly interfaces with React and Tailwind CSS, ensuring responsive and seamless experiences.
Created and deployed machine learning solutions with Python, including sentiment analysis and integrations with Stable Diffusion, Llama3, and OpenAI APIs.

cerocinco.title: Web Developer
points: Developed websites and e-commerce solutions with WordPress, JavaScript, and PHP for multiple clients.
Implemented headless solutions using the WordPress API, connecting modern React frontends.
Applied continuous improvements in performance, UX, and maintainability with cross-functional teams.

projects.title: Projects.
projects.description: The following projects showcase my skills and experience through real-world examples. Each project is briefly described with links to code repositories and live demos. They reflect my ability to solve complex problems, work with different technologies, and manage projects effectively.

gifApp.name: Gifs App
gifApp.description: A website to search for your favorite GIFs using the Giphy API.

pigPockets.name: Pig pockets
pigPockets.description: Augmented reality game interface for mobile devices using C#, Vuforia Engine, and Unity. Currently under development.

webMusicPlayer.name: Web Music Player
webMusicPlayer.description: A music player built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript using a neumorphism/sketchmorphism style.

portfolioWeb.name: My portfolio web
portfolioWeb.description: A portfolio website built with React and Three.js for 3D experiences.

compatibilityTest.name: Couple Compatibility Test Website
compatibilityTest.description: A project created for a client who needed a Valentine's Day compatibility test.

stack.description: Html5 - Css3 - Javascript - React - Tailwind css - GIT - Figma (for interface creation) - Mysql
